artist.name: Megurine Luka

pvs.author: ikuy398
pvs.description:
It has given good stimuli to my ears. Oh, I feel good...

Translated author's comment:
I made annoyance when fingerprints were given on my glasses a song.

Original by Ultra-Noob,
From http://www.nicovideo.jp/watch/nm9440139

Translation lyrics:

To wash my face
glasses I put on the desk
Those you're touching in fun
are my glasses

Your finger dancing on the clear lens
left snow footprints
on the stage of clean glass

Your fingertip in my glasses
snatches my sight
The distance to you in my glasses
is my territory

Your fingertip in my glasses
snatches my heart
Your breath in my glasses
is only for me

To gaze into the distance
the magic I use is "GLASSES"
The glasses for you and me
are unable to see anything now

Being absorbed into the clear color of the skin...
The heart of clean glass
gets fogging by your breath

*Your fingertip in my glasses
snatches my sight
Your magic in my glasses
blocks my way

Your fingertip in my glasses
snatches my heart
With your fantasy in my glasses
I'm satisfied

Coffee you squirted out
twinkled with the sunlight
like countless lenses
and poured into my face

"GLASSES"

(Repeat *)
pvs.name: Megurine Luka - MEGANE (GLASSES) - English & Romaji Subs

pvs.author: Lysimachus
pvs.description: 'MEGANE' feat. Megurine Luka, track 12 from the 2011 compilation album 'EX:P2 ～Ex:Producers2～,' with this track by Ultra-Noob. I really like this track, I could've used the eclectic album art cover for an image but I preferred something more relevant to the song.
pvs.name: MEGANE - Ultra-Noob

pvs.author: Ultra-Noob
pvs.description: 自分のメガネに指紋を付けられた時の、あのイライラを歌にしました。(でも、もしそれが大好きな人の指紋だったら・・・！？)素敵なイラストはUpRightLeftDownChuChuChuさんよりお借りしました(http://piapro.jp/tanaka2suzuki)(8/11)EX:P2 ～Ex:Producers2～に収録されます！⇒ http://www.exproducers2.jp/オケとかmp3とか： 320kbでオケとmp3うｐしましたー！ピアプロ(http://piapro.jp/gerimax)投稿動画一覧： mylist/10902612
pvs.name: 【巡音ルカ】MEGANE【オリジナル】
